label: onboarding-visible
context: Welcome modal open — avatar button, name, pronouns, About me fields visible

label: avatar-editor-opened
context: AvatarEditor modal opened with synthetic image loaded

label: avatar-editor-dwell
context: AvatarEditor showing circular crop preview, zoom slider, rotate buttons

label: avatar-repositioned
context: Image dragged to reposition within the crop circle

label: avatar-applied
context: Apply clicked — cropped avatar saved, AvatarEditor closes

label: avatar-in-modal
context: Avatar preview appears in the welcome modal

label: name-entered
context: Name "Corey" entered in the name field

label: onboarding-complete
context: Get started clicked — avatar appears in the sidebar
